name: metasploit-vsftpd-backdoor
summary:
Exploração do Backdoor vsFTPd 2.3.4
Simulação e exploração do backdoor no serviço vsFTPd v2.3.4 — laboratório com Metasploit e script autônomo em Ruby.

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with wiliam227user/CVE-2018-12633-TPLink-Auth-Bypass (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with vysecurity/post-exploitation (score=9); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with thinuri99/Sudo-Security-Bypass-Vulnerability-CVE-2019-14287- (score=9); pair in the chain planner.

Phase 3: same attack_surface=['shell_windows', 'shell_linux', 'ad'] and phase_hint='post_exploit'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

Phase 4: same attack_surface=['shell_windows', 'shell_linux', 'ad'] and phase_hint='post_exploit'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

Phase 5: same attack_surface=['shell_windows', 'shell_linux', 'ad'] and phase_hint='post_exploit'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use this tool when the engagement is in the 'post_exploit' phase against a target with '['shell_windows', 'shell_linux', 'ad']' as the attack surface (post-exploitation, toolbox, github).
documentation.why_to_use: This tool is preferred because: Index entry in the Post-Exploitation category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner after a NVD/lookup pass on the target vendor.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: Index entry in the Post-Exploitation category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner after a NVD/lookup pass on the target vendor.
Pairs with the Post-Exploitation system-prompt stanza in core.ai_backend.chain to teach the LLM the standard invocation pattern.
Operator-initiated: the chain step is gated by the per-step ACCEPT/CANCEL gate; the tool does not auto-execute.
Use as a reference implementation when designing a new v3 method for this category.
Use as a teaching example in the prompt stanza so the LLM can reason about the right run order.
